item.description: 2017W # 260023 UE Relativity and Cosmology I – Exercises, (20017W) # Rules of assessment/Übungsmodalitäten Problems: Problem Sheet 1 (1-5) [pdf] Problem Sheet 2 (6-9) [pdf] Problem Sheet 3 (10-15) [pdf] Problem Sheet 4 (16-20) [pdf] Problem Sheet 5 (21-26) [pdf] Problem Sheet 6 (27-33) [pdf] Problem Sheet 7 (34-40) [pdf] Problem Sheet 8 (41-47) [pdf] Problem Sheet 9 (48-51) [pdf]
2018S # 260017 UE Mathematical Methods of Physics I – Exercises, (2018S) #

2018W # 260023 UE Relativity and Cosmology I – Exercises, (2018W) # Rules of assessment/Übungsmodalitäten References: J.M. Heinzle, Introduction to Relativity and Cosmology I, 2010 R. Beig, RT1, 2010 N.M.J. Woodhouse, Special Relativity, Springer, 2003, also N.M.J. Woodhouse, Spezielle Relativitätstheorie, Springer, 2016 R. Meinel, Spezielle und allgemeine Relativitätstheorie für Bachelorstudenten, Springer, 2016 Problems: Problem Sheet 1 (1-5) [pdf] Problem Sheet 2 (6-9) [pdf] Problem Sheet 3 (10-15) [pdf] Problem Sheet 4 (16-20) [pdf] Problem Sheet 5 (21-26) [pdf] Problem Sheet 6 (27-32) [pdf] Problem Sheet 7 (33-35) [pdf] Problem Sheet 8 (36-57) [pdf] Problem Sheet 9 (58-61) [pdf] 260040 UE Theoretical Physics III: Electrodynamics - Exercises, (2018W) # References: H.

2019S # 260025 PUE General Theory of Relativity and Cosmology – Exercises, (2019S) # Rules of assessment/Übungsmodalitäten References: Lecturer’s notes L.P. Hughston, K.P. Tod, An Introduction to General Relativity, Cambridge University Press, 1991 R.M. Wald, General Relativity, University of Chicago Press, 1984 Problem Sheets: [pdf] Extra: F. Battaglia, T.F. George, Tensors: a guide for undergraduate students, Am. J. Phys. 81(7), 498–511 (2013) Stereographic projection: [nb], [pdf] P.
2019W # 260061 PUE Introduction to Theory of Relativity – Exercises, (2019W) # Problem sheets (1-40): [pdf] 260098 PUE Theoretical Physics II: Electrodynamics – Exercises, (2019W) #

2020S # 260023 VO General Theory of Relativity and Cosmology – Lecture, (2020S) # Videos of the lecture are posted on Moodle page of the course. 260025 PUE General Theory of Relativity and Cosmology – Exercises, (2020S) # Submission of solutions via Moodle page of the course. Problems (1-64): [pdf]

2020W # 260061 PUE Introduction to Theory of Relativity – Exercises, (2020W) # Rules of assessment/Übungsmodalitäten Collected problems (updated as needed): [pdf] Submission of solutions via Moodle. 260098 PUE Theoretical Physics II: Electrodynamics – Exercises, (2020W) # Rules of assessment/Übungsmodalitäten Problems Moodle page of the lecture Submission of solutions via Moodle.
2021S # 260049 VO Relativity III: Introduction to Numerical Relativity – Lecture, (2021S) # Important Rules of assessment/Übungsmodalitäten Submission of solutions via Moodle
